description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 50 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 14 mins. His time was mostly in Java (63%), along with Markdown (22%) and other languages (13%). The activity data does not list any public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
